title: Spain's Solar Is So Cheap Investors Are Looking for an Exit
abstract: Investors are flocking to exit from Spain's cheap solar market, a bizarre situation that raises an eyebrow. Wondering why? Dive into the economic reasoning behind it and join us in exploring what these investors are really worried about.
abstract_zh: 西班牙太阳能电价便宜得让投资者都急着想脱手，这画面是不是有点搞笑？你是不是也觉得这事儿挺离谱的呢？快来了解下这个现象背后的经济逻辑吧！一起看看投资者们到底在担心什么！
